title: 玄中记
description:
Welcome to the Eastern fantasy world of Xuanzhong Ji, where cel-shaded art brings ancient mythology to life in a fully immersive 3D open world. Meet loyal friends and kindred spirits, and set out on an unforgettable Xianxia adventure filled with wonder, discovery, and lasting bonds across the vast Xuanzhong continent.

 A Massive Hand-Painted World Awaits

Explore a sprawling map crafted with stunning cel-shaded art, bringing ancient myths to life. Every corner holds secrets, mysteries, and endless adventures waiting to be discovered.

 

Capture Hundreds of Spirits & Beasts

The land of Xuanzhong is teeming with unique spirits and powerful gods, ready to be found and tamed.

 

 

Build Your Dream Home & Raise a Kun

Create your own sanctuary in the mystical Huanming Mountains. Build, decorate, invite friends over, and nurture your very own adorable Kun.

 Player-Driven Open Market

All top-tier gear drops in-game, with tradable items, companion eggs, crafting materials, and more freely available on the open market.

Epic Guild Wars & Territory Battles

Choose your class, join a guild, and fight for control over boss territories in chaotic, large-scale PvP battles.

 

Come to Xuanzhong, and live free as a wild spirit!
description_short: An Eastern fantasy cel-shaded MMORPG inspired by ancient mythology, set in the open Xuanzhong world. Explore a massive hand-painted map, capture & breed beasts, build your home, trade freely, join guild battles—embark on an immersive Xianxia adventure!
